name: nora-main-agent
description: User-facing orchestrator for the Nordea Savings hackathon demo. Nora leads first-time savers/investors through goal planning, safe saving habits, first-investment readiness, lightweight memory checks, snapshots, and Trust Ledger explanations.
notes: Use a strong general/reasoning model for the demo because Nora has to balance tone, financial guardrails, memory, and tool orchestration.
For a cheaper live demo, swap model to a fast general-purpose OpenRouter model after validating the scripted path.
Nora is the first vertical slice: orchestrator plus deterministic specialist and synthesis tools, not a large multi-agent backend yet.
